heading: Prompt action on payment of claims
label: 1621s Prompt action on payment of claims

children.heading: Time of response
children.label: a Time of response
children.text: The Service shall respond to a notification of a claim by a provider of a contract care service with either an individual purchase order or a denial of the claim within 5 working days after the receipt of such notification.

children.heading: Failure to timely respond
children.label: b Failure to timely respond
children.text: If the Service fails to respond to a notification of a claim in accordance with subsection (a), the Service shall accept as valid the claim submitted by the provider of a contract care service.

children.heading: Time of payment
children.label: c Time of payment
children.text: The Service shall pay a completed contract care service claim within 30 days after completion of the claim.
